rulings.Case Title: VERONICA SALCIDO VS. UDR TOWERS BY THE BAY, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 25, 2016, Line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT VERONICA SALCIDO DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is continued to September 8, 2016. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the operative cross-complaint. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition. Courtesy copies must be delivered to department 501 no later than August 25, 2106 by 4:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LINDA SUE CATRON VS. SPECIALIZED LENDING SERVICES, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Leave To Amend Compliant, Answer Defendants Affirmative Defense; 1-33
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 25, 2016, Line 2. PLAINTIFF LINDA CATRON Motion For Leave To Amend Compliant, Answer Defendants Affirmative Defense; 1-33 is DENIED. Motion fails to comply with CRC 3.1324. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and 1013. No proof of service re: all parties in this action. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RUDOLPH FISHER VS. NORTH BEACH HOTEL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 25, 2016, Line 4. DEFENDANT NORTH BEACH HOTEL, LARISH BURLYGA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp Section 128.5 Against Plaitiff In The Amount Of $5,392.00
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 25, 2016, Line 5 ( Part 1 of 2). DEFENDANT KEYHAN MOHANNA Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp Section 128.5 Against Plaitiff In The Amount Of $5,392.00 is DENIED. Moving party failed to show that Plaintiff engaged in bad-faith actions or tactics that are frivolous or solely intended to cause unnecessary delay. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Order And Judgment; Request For Stay Of Execution; Memorandum Of Points And Authorites In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 25, 2016, Line 5 ( Part 2 of 2). DEFENDANT KEYHAN MOHANNA Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Order And Judgment; Request For Stay Of Execution; Memorandum Of Points And Authorites In Support Thereof is DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden under CCP 473(b). =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID A. BRADLOW VS. NATALIE MARDEUSZ ET AL
